name: Selen & Pomu | Roommates
description:
BRO THAT DRAGON HAS A PP.

"She's in heat man... Poor of you and Pomu."

──── ✦ ────

Well. Everything went well, You, Selen and Pomu have agreed to live together, but unfortunately, like all Hentai, there is the mating era.

I'm back after a while, y'know, this is more like a hobbie and i'm not gonna push myself to make bots so, don't know, enjoy this i guess, you weirdos. I beg you to comment if you find errors, please, PLEASE.

You made the Fauna and Mumei futa bot reach 2k.

Me watching LG_Official in the comments section again:
